preview.title: Dependency remediation preview
preview.subtitle: Compute the proposed package.json edit for this project's vulnerable npm dependencies. This is a dry-run — it never opens a pull request.
preview.no_changes: No upgrades are available. The manifest's npm dependencies are already at their minimum-safe versions.
preview.no_manifest: No package.json was found for this project. Run a scan that preserves the source, or upload a manifest, to compute a preview.

pr.title: Automated remediation pull request
pr.subtitle: Open a pull request on this project's linked GitHub repository that applies the proposed bump. Team admins only.
pr.role_gated: Only team admins can open an automated remediation pull request. Ask a team admin to run it, or review the preview above.
pr.not_opted_in: This project is not linked to a GitHub App installation, so automated pull requests are disabled. A team admin can link a repository in the project's integration settings to enable this.
pr.forbidden: You do not have permission to open an automated remediation pull request for this project.
pr.noop: There is nothing to remediate — the manifest is already up to date, so no pull request was opened.

list.title: Remediation pull requests
list.empty: No remediation pull requests have been opened for this project yet.
